word: G1959 - ἐπιμελέομαι - epimeléomai - ep-ee-mel-eh'-om-ahee - Take care of

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Take care of
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to take care of a person or thing
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from G1909 and the same as G3199; to care for (physically or otherwise): - take care of.
